title: DGR TO HOST EXCLUSIVE JOB FAIR FOR EX-SERVICEMEN AT DELHI
text:
Press Release:Press Information Bureau

Ministry of Defence

DGR TO HOST EXCLUSIVE JOB FAIR FOR EX-SERVICEMEN AT DELHI

Posted On:
16 MAR 2026 11:38AM by PIB Delhi

In a landmark initiative to empower and support the reintegration of Ex-Servicemen into the civilian workforce, the
Directorate General Resettlement (DGR)
, Department of Ex-Servicemen Welfare (MoD) is organizing a
Job Fair for Ex-Servicemen
on
20 Mar 2026
 at New Delhi.

This job fair will serve as a dedicated platform to connect Ex-Servicemen of Indian Army, Navy and Air Force with leading employers from Corporate and Industry from diverse sectors including security, IT, administration, logistics, healthcare, administration and engineering.

This initiative reflects continued commitment of Department of Ex-Servicemen Welfare (MoD) towards resettlement and welfare of Ex-Servicemen, ensuring they are recognized for their discipline, leadership and technical expertise – skills that are highly valued in the civilian job market. DGR is conducting 18 Job Fairs for Ex-Servicemen at various locations pan India during FY 2025-26 out of which seventeen Job Fairs have been conducted in Delhi, Chennai, Ahmedabad, Lucknow, Varanasi, Kolkata, Secunderabad, Jammu, Bhopal, Kochi, Guwahati, Dehradun, Bengaluru, Pune & Chandigarh till now.

Ex-Servicemen will have the opportunity to showcase their talents to recruiters who understand and appreciate the unique value that Ex-Servicemen bring to the workforce. Employers will gain free access to the resumes of a pool of dedicated, skilled and mission-ready professionals on registration. Employers can plan for interview and selection of prior shortlisted candidates during the Job Fair.

Employers and Ex-Servicemen can register online on
www.esmhire.com
 which is an AI powered job platform exclusively for Ex-Servicemen. Link for registration is also available on DGR website
www.dgrindia.gov.in
 under Job Fair button.
Registration is now open and is free for ESM and Employers.

Date and Time:
20 Mar 2026, 7:00 A.M. onwards

Venue:
Aravali Auditorium, Near Shankar Vihar Metro Station, Delhi Cantt,

 New Delhi-110010

For more information, please contact
:-

Director (SE), DGR :
dirsedgr@desw,gov.in
 | Phone: 011-20862532

Joint Director (SE), DGR :
seopadgr@desw.gov.in
 | Phone: 011-20863432

​​​​​​​
